acceptance_criteria: 1) Single canonical definition for SubmitHandler, LlmTools, SubmitError, SubmitSlot, and helpers. 2) Architecture loop compiles against concrete runtime exports without adapter shims. 3) No dead placeholder runtime types remain.
description: Remove placeholder runtime-only structs for SubmitHandler/LlmTools from architecture-side runtime module and point RLM at the concrete runtime implementation modules. Eliminate duplicate type definitions so loop/runtime contract has one canonical source.
title: Unify runtime type source to concrete PyO3 implementation
